headline: Glass House Brands Announces the Filing of Shelf Prospectus and At-The-Market Distribution Program
summary: LONG BEACH, Calif. and TORONTO, June 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Glass House Brands Inc. (“Glass House” or the “Company”) (CBOE CA: GLAS.A.U) (CBOE CA: GLAS.WT.U) (OTCQX: GLASF) (OTCQX:GHBWF) announced today that it has filed a short form base shelf prospectus (the “Shelf Prospectus”) dated June 10, 2026 with the securities regulatory authorities in all provinces and territories of Canada. headline: Assessing Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Valuation After Recent Pullback And Ongoing Earnings Growth Expectations
summary: Short term moves and recent performance context Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) climbed 3.6% in the latest session, building on a 5.6% gain over the past week, even as the stock is down about 14.1% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Cboe Global Markets. Despite the recent pullback that left the 1 month share price return down 14.1%, Cboe Global Markets still has positive momentum, with the year to date share price return at 21.35% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 36.5%. headline: Verano Completes 1-for-5 Reverse Stock Split, Advancing the Company’s Path Towards Prospective U.S. Stock Exchange Listing
summary: CHICAGO, June 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verano Holdings Corp. (Cboe CA: VRNO) (OTCQX: VRNO) (“Verano” or the “Company”), a leading multi-state cannabis company, today announced that the 1-for-5 reverse stock split (“Reverse Stock Split”) of the Company’s common stock, which was previously announced on June 1, 2026, has been completed, effective today, June 11, 2026. In addition, the Company filed a certificate of change with the state of Nevada on June 2, 2026, effective today, June 11, 2026,

content.title: Verano Completes 1-for-5 Reverse Stock Split, Advancing the Company’s Path Towards Prospective U.S. Stock Exchange Listing
content.summary: CHICAGO, June 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verano Holdings Corp. (Cboe CA: VRNO) (OTCQX: VRNO) (“Verano” or the “Company”), a leading multi-state cannabis company, today announced that the 1-for-5 reverse stock split (“Reverse Stock Split”) of the Company’s common stock, which was previously announced on June 1, 2026, has been completed, effective today, June 11, 2026. In addition, the Company filed a certificate of change with the state of Nevada on June 2, 2026, effective today, June 11, 2026,
